title: Joint Proceedings of the MathUI, OpenMath and ThEdu Workshops and Work in Progress track at CICM co-located with Conferences on Intelligent Computer Mathematics (CICM 2014)
abstract: This joint volume gathers together papers with those contributed to the workshops held at CICM 2014. The Proceedings consists of 29 papers accepted for the following Workshops and Work in Progress track at CICM 2014: -- The 9th Workshop on Mathematical User Interfaces (MathUI) -- The 26th OpenMath Workshop -- The 2014 Workshop on Theorem proving components for Educational software (ThEdu) -- The Work in Progress Section of the CICM.
